policy_description: Standard recovery / break allocation per full shift
Upper safe daily scheduled hours before overtime strain

Minimum recovery / break gap considered healthy in a shift

Capacity coverage ratio below this signals staffing pressure
Monthly overtime level that materially increases burnout exposure
